title: ARG Craft
description: If you like those ARG Minecraft videos on YouTube, then you will most definitely love this modpack. This has a couple entities but not the annoying ones that are in other scary packs. This is one that with give you the chills.
body:
Do you ever feel like something is off...

well your right..

your world seems empty but still you feel like something.. or someone is watching you "always"

where is it; behind the wall, around the tree, in the cave, or right behind you.

who's following you, where did all of the leaves go, why are there nametags, "who's there?"

This modpack adds different arg style things like Herobrine, weird sounds, lonelyness/no minecraft related mobs, and other entities ready to get you. If you like a scary horror fun modpack to play, this is the one for you. Also there is a shader that adds a VHS filter on your screen to make it feel even more erie and scarier. If you like this modpack make sure to follow me for more like these.
